title: There Was Once a King...
writer: Jirí Brdecka, Oldrich Kautský, Jan Werich
actors: Jan Werich, Vlasta Burian, Irena Kacírková
plot: A story about a king who out of three daughters preferred two: the most beautiful and the most cheerful, and the most intelligent, and even able to cook well, he kicked out, which he later bitterly regretted.
